caption: In an indoor transit area with red pillars and a light-colored floor, a group of men dressed in athletic wear and casual attire gather near a white team bus. Several men wear grey t-shirts and black trousers, and many are wearing black face masks. One man in a yellow shirt stands to the left. In the background, a white bus is visible with the text "Real Madrid" printed on its side. A circular logo featuring a crown and letters is overlaid in the top right corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the men shift positions; those on the left move toward the center and right, while others stand waiting. A person carrying a black backpack moves across the frame, and some individuals appear to be interacting or talking as they prepare to board or depart from the bus.
